data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement for calendar synchronization, but there is no evidence provided that confirms this functionality is implemented or operational. The linked use case mentions the need for calendar sync, but the prior step evidence does not include any checks or confirmations regarding the actual integration with Google or Outlook calendars. Therefore, a gap exists in the evidence needed to satisfy this requirement.
gaps: No evidence confirming the implementation of calendar sync with Google/Outlook.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
